children.name: p
children.textContent: Your balance will be $390 when rent clears Mar 27. You're cutting it close.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Both subscriptions hit Mar 24, two days before rent. Total: $28.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Your safe-to-spend drops to $82 this weekend. Best to wait until after payday.
